overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy walking across an ancient ceremonial stone bridge in a desert landscape during golden hour. The character transitions from the enclosed bridge pathway to open desert terrain, approaching a scenic overlook of a river valley with distant rock formations and ancient ruins.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient stone bridge with ceremonial banners

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the stone bridge toward the distant mesa fortress

entered.detail: wide stone-paved bridge with weathered tiles
ornate red sandstone railings with geometric carvings lining both sides
tall wooden poles with flowing teal fabric banners
large stone fortress built into the cliff face atop a mesa
distant mountain range with snow-covered peaks

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an ancient stone bridge with ornate red railings and teal ceremonial banners. The path leads toward a massive fortress built into a distant mesa, with snow-capped mountains visible in the background under warm golden hour lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: bridge exit with ceremonial gate pavilions

events.description: passing through the stone gate pavilions marking the end of the bridge

agents.ego_description: walking through the gate structures and leaving the bridge behind

notable_agents.action: guard leaning on the bridge railing looking out at the desert landscape

entered.detail: roofed stone structure with red tiles marking the bridge exit
sandy dirt trail leading away from the bridge into open desert

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the end of the bridge, passing a guard leaning on the right railing. They walk through two roofed gate pavilions, transitioning from the stone bridge onto a dirt desert path as the bridge structure falls behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert trail with ancient stone pillars

events.description: river valley comes into view in the distance between the hills

agents.ego_description: hiking along the desert path toward the emerging river valley

entered.detail: tall carved stone pillar with circular top structure
sparse dry bushes and small cacti along the trail
winding river visible in the canyon below

segments.scene_description: Walking along an open desert trail past ancient stone pillars and sparse vegetation. The terrain opens up to reveal a river valley in the distance, with the character approaching a scenic overlook of the canyon and distant rock formations.

events.description: character slows and stops at the overlook to view the landscape

agents.ego_description: pausing at the cliff edge to overlook the river valley and distant natural rock arch

entered.detail: large natural stone arch formation in the distant cliff wall
ruined structures atop the distant mesa with a large archway
small stone structure with red roof at the viewpoint

segments.scene_description: The character reaches a cliffside overlook with panoramic views of the river canyon below. A prominent natural rock arch and ancient ruins are visible in the distance across the valley. The character stops to observe the scenic landscape as the sun illuminates the desert terrain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an ornate ceremonial bridge into a vast, open desert landscape during the golden hour. It begins with the character walking along a stone bridge adorned with red railings and teal banners, heading toward a massive fortress built into a distant mesa. As the character passes a guard and moves through two roofed gate pavilions, the structured stone path transitions into a dusty desert trail. The scene then expands across an open terrain of stone pillars and sparse vegetation before turning toward a cliffside overlook. Finally, the camera reaches the edge of the canyon to reveal a panoramic view of a river valley, featuring a prominent natural rock arch and ancient ruins illuminated by the setting sun.
